name: ai-fitness-coach
description: AI-powered fitness coaching for diabetics and BP patients (English + Tamil)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.db:setup: docker compose up -d postgres && cd server && npx prisma db push && npm run db:seed -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
